creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reworking of bsd.autotools.mk to limit the number of simple
	changes that have to occur throughout the tree, now that we
	have legacy/current versions of autoconf/automake.

	The stanza-passing code is now considerably more bulletproof.

	This should theoretically be a no-op.  Heh.

Fix: 

http://tinderbox.lovett.com/patches/autotools-20101117.diff

	SHA256=
	5957be80d54be33c93d931dc05324306ee9530497ebdd6fbc8e18d832f23fc2d
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
